description: Real-time child indoor localization — QU H07 C Corridor senior design project — direct Wi-Fi architecture (v4.0): BW16 tag posts IMU+RTT data directly to cloud server over HTTPS on QU-User Wi-Fi
update_protocol: pull-merge-push — always git pull before modifying this file. Only modify entries where owner == your identity.

tasks.title: Initialize project structure
tasks.notes: Full scaffold committed and pushed to GitHub; all dirs, placeholder files, configs, and rules in place
tasks.acceptance: git log shows initial commit; all directories exist; tasks.json and progress.txt present

tasks.title: requirements.txt and Dockerfile
tasks.notes: requirements.txt and Dockerfile created; docker compose build exits 0
tasks.acceptance: docker compose build completes without errors

tasks.title: PostgreSQL schema and SQLAlchemy models
tasks.notes: 7 SQLAlchemy ORM tables; SQLite in-memory tests; 14 tests pass

tasks.title: Configuration and security core
tasks.notes: pydantic-settings config, JWT via python-jose, bcrypt passwords; 11 tests pass

tasks.title: Device packet parser (binary IMU/RTT payload over HTTPS)
tasks.notes: ble_parser.py: parse() dispatches 0x01→ImuPacket, 0x02→RttPacket; struct-based little-endian parsing; all edge cases handled; 37 tests pass

tasks.title: BW16 firmware — IMU reader + RTT ranger subsystems (unified sketch)
tasks.notes: Implemented inside firmware/bw16/main/main.ino (unified sketch — all subsystems compiled together). IMU subsystem: MPU6050 at 100 Hz, packs Type 0x01 binary packet per spec. RTT subsystem: one-sided Wi-Fi RTT per AP, packs Type 0x02 packet. Both subsystems hand data to the Wi-Fi sender subsystem (TASK-05C) within the same sketch.
tasks.acceptance: firmware/bw16/main/main.ino compiles for BW16 (Realtek Arduino SDK); serial output matches packet_format.h byte layout for both IMU and RTT packet types; verified by manual inspection of packed bytes against packet spec

tasks.title: BW16 firmware — Wi-Fi HTTPS sender subsystem (unified in main.ino)
tasks.notes: Wi-Fi sender subsystem inside firmware/bw16/main/main.ino. Connects to QU-User SSID on startup, base64-encodes binary IMU/RTT packets from TASK-05B subsystems, POSTs to https://trakn.duckdns.org/api/v1/gateway/packet with X-API-Key header. Device MAC 24:42:E3:15:E5:72 pre-registered with QU IT. All subsystems (IMU, RTT, Wi-Fi sender) are part of the same single compiled sketch — flashing main.ino deploys everything at once.
tasks.acceptance: firmware/bw16/main/main.ino compiles for BW16; device connects to QU-User Wi-Fi and successfully POSTs to server; curl https://trakn.duckdns.org/api/v1/health returns 200; OQ-01 (RTT SDK) resolved before this task starts

tasks.title: Device gateway API endpoint (direct HTTPS POST from BW16)
tasks.notes: POST /api/v1/gateway/packet — accepts direct HTTPS POSTs from BW16 device. Body: {device_mac, rx_ts_utc, payload_b64}. Auth: X-API-Key header. Decodes base64 payload, calls packet parser (TASK-05), routes to fusion coordinator (TASK-13). BLE gateway relay path removed.

tasks.title: Offset correction engine
tasks.notes: correct(d_raw, offset) = max(d_raw-offset, 0.5); 7 tests pass

tasks.title: Calibration admin endpoints
tasks.notes: JWT-protected CRUD for ap_calibration; is_reliable gate (std>20 or n<30); 8 tests pass

tasks.title: Floor plan grid loader
tasks.notes: grid_loader.py: PNG/JSON loader + make_synthetic_grid + coordinate helpers; 15 tests pass

tasks.title: Observation model implementation
tasks.notes: observation_model.py: mu, sigma, p_observation with locked Horn 2022 constants; 12 tests pass

tasks.title: Bayesian grid update engine
tasks.notes: bayesian_grid.py: vectorised likelihood update, MAP estimate, collapse recovery (sum<1e-10 → uniform reset + log); 13 tests pass

tasks.title: EKF predict and update steps
tasks.notes: ekf.py: 4-state KF predict/update, locked P0/Q/R matrices, divergence check, ZUPT, reset; 22 tests pass

tasks.title: PDR Python module — full MATLAB algorithm migration
tasks.notes: pdr.py: full MATLAB port — EMA filter, gyro bias cal, rolling-window step detection, Weinberg+SVR hybrid, 20-bin histogram, SVR retrain; 39 tests pass
tasks.acceptance: pytest tests/test_pdr.py passes all tests including: EMA filter convergence, gyro bias calibration, step detection true positive, stationary suppression, near-gravity suppression, debounce, Weinberg formula correctness, histogram bin edges match MATLAB output, SVR feature extraction, stride clamping, position update math

tasks.title: Fusion coordinator async loop
tasks.notes: coordinator.py: async on_imu/on_rtt pipeline, ZUPT, EKF divergence reset, mode logic, publish_position stub+set_publisher; 23 tests pass. Data now arrives via direct HTTPS POST from BW16 (not BLE gateway); coordinator interface unchanged.

tasks.title: WebSocket broadcaster
tasks.notes: WSS endpoint at wss://trakn.duckdns.org/ws/position/{device_id} (port 443 via Nginx). Implements publish_position() called by coordinator. Nginx WebSocket upgrade headers already configured.

tasks.title: Parent REST API endpoints
tasks.notes: Parent registers via QR code scan on tag. JWT auth. Endpoints: POST /auth/login, GET /devices/{device_id}/position, GET /devices (linked devices list). All traffic over HTTPS port 443.

tasks.title: Flutter project setup and WebSocket service
tasks.notes: WebSocket URL: wss://trakn.duckdns.org/ws/position/{device_id}. Update from any prior ws:// or port 8000 URLs. Auth token passed as query param or header.
tasks.acceptance: flutter analyze shows 0 errors; WebSocket service connects to mock server

tasks.title: Flutter live map screen
tasks.notes: Renders child position on H07-C corridor floor plan. Confidence indicator from WebSocket message. QR code scan flow to link device.
tasks.acceptance: flutter build apk --debug succeeds; marker renders at correct coordinates

tasks.title: Full integration test pipeline
tasks.notes: End-to-end: simulate BW16 HTTPS POST (binary IMU+RTT payload) → gateway endpoint → fusion coordinator → WebSocket push → Flutter client. Direct Wi-Fi path only (no BLE gateway). Verify RMS error <= 2.5 m and P95 latency <= 2.5 s.
tasks.acceptance: pytest tests/integration/ passes; RMS error printed; latency P95 <= 2.5s

tasks.title: Health check and monitoring endpoint
tasks.notes: GET /api/v1/health returns {status,database,fusion_engine,active_devices,uptime_seconds}; 6 tests pass

tasks.title: Final validation and cleanup
tasks.notes: Verify full stack on GCP VM: curl https://trakn.duckdns.org/api/v1/health returns 200. Confirm BW16 posts live data. Confirm Flutter app receives live positions via WSS. Write DEPLOYMENT.md.
tasks.acceptance: pytest --tb=short -q shows 0 failures; docker compose up healthy; DEPLOYMENT.md written; final commit pushed
